calendar.matters:
Motion For Apportionment/Distribution Of Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on Motion for Order to Distributer Settlement Funds. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer. Nancy Williams. Esq. appearing on behalf of the Plaintiff presents evidence. Good cause appearing, the Court grants the motion as follows: Settlement $769.19; Attorney fees and cost: $492.00; net balance of $277.19 settlement to the widow, Theresia Schmidt and the right to sign any settlement agreement in the future.

Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for Motion for apportionment of settlement funds. There being no appearances in the matter, the court order the matter off calendar.

Motion For Apportionment Of Settlement Proceeds On Calendar In Scd 218 At 9:00 A.M. On August 15, 2002.
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for Motion for apportionment of settlement funds. There being no appearances in the matter, the court order the matter off calendar.
